implementation_plan.goal: Create a PR to validate the PR workflow using a single, visible, non-functional text change in src/pages/Index.tsx.
implementation_plan.issue_body:
Summary - Change type: Chore/Test PR flow - Scope: One visible, non-functional text change only. Change Details - Updated heading in AIBriefShell from: AI Investment Brief -> AI Investment Brief (Demo) Before/After Snippet - Before:
AI Investment Brief
- After:
AI Investment Brief (Demo)
Validation Steps - Build app and load the dashboard. - Verify the heading now reads "AI Investment Brief (Demo)". - Confirm no layout, styling, or behavior changes. Checklist - [x] Changed exactly one visible string in src/pages/Index.tsx - [x] No logic, imports, styling, or layout changed - [x] CI pipeline green (lint/typecheck/tests) - [ ] If snapshot tests fail, update snapshots only after reviewer approval Reviewers - technical_architect, qa_analyst
recommended_first_changes: git commit -m "chore: test PR flow — safe text-only change in Index.tsx"
Open PR: title "Test PR flow: safe text-only change in Index.tsx"; body per template; request reviews from technical_architect and qa_analyst; apply labels chore,test,safe-change
notes: Do not introduce any other file changes in this PR.
If CI snapshot tests fail due to the text change, coordinate with reviewers before updating snapshots.

handoff.next_required_action: Create branch chore/test-pr-flow-index-text, commit the one-line change already prepared, push, and open the PR with the provided title/body; request reviews from technical_architect and qa_analyst and monitor CI.
